title: Easy Light Plus
description: Ever dreamed to mine get simple light blocks/slabs? Download this mod to make your wish come true
body:
This mod adds 2 items:
-The Light Block
-The Light Slab

![Crafting of the Light Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ff4d31dd22494829896849ead4931449691347.png)

[Crafting of the Light Slab]
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e573c2a4077025bcfb51688bde06f338c8ef75b.png)

![Light Block and Light Slab view 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776e7ca69f881d5a2ed27a940049ceddb32e7ff2.png)

![Light Block and Light Slab view 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56405854b0615330a391a37512879b88f84113e6.png)
